winner_archetype: Complete player. Muirfield Village rewards all-around excellence: precision off the tee, quality approach play into difficult green complexes, and sharp bentgrass putting. Historical winners include Scheffler (multiple), Cantlay (2x), Rory McIlroy, Bryson DeChambeau — elite multi-category players. Not a bomber's course; course management and iron precision are primary differentiators.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Standard individual BBI v8.5 rankings. Memorial at Muirfield Village has rich course history (annual event since 1976). Phase 1 should return high field coverage (60%+).
course_notes: Muirfield Village Golf Club, Dublin OH. Par-72, 7547y. Designed by Jack Nicklaus, hosted Memorial since 1976. One of the most respected venues on Tour. Elevated greens, significant rough (1.12in), bentgrass greens at 13.0 stimp. Long par-4s require precision approach play. Water in play on several key holes (15, 16). Historical winners are typically elite all-around players.
